projects.title: AI Hub
projects.description: Experience the full spectrum of frontier intelligence — all the most advanced AI models, unified under a single, powerful subscription.
projects.challenge: The primary challenge was achieving a balance between high-end, visually rich motion design and maintaining fast, seamless product browsing performance—especially across dense catalog views with multiple interactive elements.
projects.improvements: Future iterations will focus on implementing personalized recommendations, A/B testing for product storytelling components, and integrating smarter inventory insights to enhance user decision-making and overall engagement.

projects.title: TileNest
projects.description: A modern tile showcase platform designed to explore, filter, and visualize a wide range of tile designs. It combines smooth animations with structured browsing to help users discover styles, patterns, and layouts efficiently.
projects.challenge: The main challenge was handling a visually dense grid of tile assets while preserving performance and ensuring smooth interactions, especially when applying filters, animations, and dynamic content loading.
projects.improvements: Future improvements include advanced filtering by material and finish, user-driven collections or favorites, and optimized media loading strategies to further enhance performance across large tile datasets.

projects.title: Dragon News
projects.description: A modern news platform built to deliver timely, unbiased journalism with a clean reading experience. It features structured content sections, category-based navigation, and responsive layouts to ensure seamless access across devices.
projects.challenge: The main challenge was organizing large volumes of news content into a clear, digestible structure while maintaining fast load times and ensuring a smooth reading experience across different screen sizes.
projects.improvements: Future enhancements include personalized news feeds, real-time updates, improved search and filtering, and stronger content moderation and editorial workflow tools to support scalable journalism.
